compliance_rules.name: cost_approval_threshold
compliance_rules.description: Any dispatch with an estimated total cost above this amount requires property manager approval before the work order is issued.

compliance_rules.name: vendor_must_be_certified
compliance_rules.description: The assigned vendor must hold at least one active certification relevant to the job category. Uncertified vendors may not be dispatched.

compliance_rules.name: fair_housing_check
compliance_rules.description: The dispatch recommendation must not contain language, scheduling decisions, or vendor selection that could constitute differential treatment by protected class. Compliance Auditor must confirm before approval.

compliance_rules.name: audit_trail_required
compliance_rules.description: Every ticket must have a complete audit trail — intake, triage, inventory check, dispatch proposal, and compliance review — before the manager approval card is shown. Incomplete traces are blocked.

compliance_rules.name: emergency_response_sla
compliance_rules.description: Tickets classified as EMERGENCY urgency must have a vendor availability window within 2 hours of ticket creation. If no vendor is available within SLA, Orchestrator must notify property manager immediately.
